name: Bodyweight Depth Drop
description: Step off box and land softly in athletic position with knees tracking over toes, absorbing force through hips and ankles.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Depth Drop
description: Step off box and land on one leg in quarter squat position, stabilising through ankle, knee and hip.

name: Bodyweight Altitude Landing
description: Step off elevated platform and land in deep athletic stance, holding the landing position for 2-3 seconds to reinforce deceleration mechanics.

name: Bodyweight Drop Jump
description: Step off box, land briefly and immediately jump vertically as high as possible, minimising ground contact time.

name: Bodyweight Drop Jump to Broad Jump
description: Step off box, land and immediately rebound forward into a maximal broad jump, combining vertical drop with horizontal power.

name: Bodyweight Drop Jump to Sprint
description: Step off box, land and immediately rebound into a 10-metre sprint, training the transition from reactive jump to acceleration.

name: Bodyweight Double Leg Hurdle Hop
description: Jump over consecutive hurdles with both feet together, driving knees up and minimising ground contact between hurdles.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Hurdle Hop
description: Hop over consecutive hurdles on one leg, driving the knee up on each rep while maintaining balance and alignment.

name: Bodyweight Lateral Hurdle Hop
description: Stand beside hurdle and jump laterally over it, landing softly and immediately rebounding back. Repeat for prescribed reps.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Lateral Hurdle Hop
description: Hop laterally over hurdle on one leg, stabilising on landing before immediately rebounding back over.

name: Bodyweight Forward Hurdle Hop
description: Jump forward over a single hurdle, landing in athletic stance. Reset and repeat, focusing on height and distance clearance.

name: Bodyweight Consecutive Forward Hurdle Hop
description: Jump forward over a series of hurdles without pausing, using a quick double-leg takeoff and landing between each.

name: Bodyweight Alternating Bound
description: Drive off one leg and bound forward, landing on the opposite foot with exaggerated arm drive and knee lift, covering maximum distance per stride.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Bound
description: Perform consecutive single leg bounds on the same leg, driving forward and upward with each hop to maximise horizontal distance.

name: Bodyweight Power Skip for Height
description: Perform an exaggerated skipping motion driving the knee as high as possible while pushing off the ground explosively for maximum vertical height.

name: Bodyweight Power Skip for Distance
description: Perform exaggerated skipping motion driving forward for maximum horizontal distance per skip, emphasising powerful hip extension.

name: Bodyweight Lateral Bound
description: Drive off one leg laterally, landing on the opposite leg in a single leg quarter squat. Hold briefly, then bound back.

name: Bodyweight Consecutive Lateral Bound
description: Perform continuous lateral bounds side to side without pausing, minimising ground contact time while covering maximum lateral distance.

name: Bodyweight Bilateral Pogo Hop
description: With legs straight and stiff ankles, bounce rapidly off the ground using only ankle plantar flexion, keeping ground contact time minimal.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Pogo Hop
description: Hop rapidly on one foot using only ankle plantar flexion, maintaining a stiff ankle and straight leg with minimal ground contact.

name: Bodyweight Ankle Hop Over Line
description: Hop forward and backward over a line on the ground with stiff ankles and minimal knee bend, focusing on rapid ground contacts.

name: Bodyweight Lateral Ankle Hop Over Line
description: Hop side to side over a line using stiff ankles and minimal knee bend, training lateral reactive ankle stiffness.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Forward Hop
description: Hop forward on one leg for distance, swinging arms to generate momentum and landing softly in a single leg stance.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Lateral Hop
description: Hop laterally on one leg, landing with control and immediately rebounding in the opposite direction.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Diagonal Hop
description: Hop diagonally forward on one leg at 45 degrees, alternating between forward-left and forward-right directions.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Multi-Directional Hop
description: Hop in a clock pattern on one leg — forward, diagonal, lateral, backward — challenging stability and reactive strength in all planes.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Box Jump Down
description: Step off box and land on a single leg in controlled quarter squat, holding the landing to build eccentric single leg control.

name: Bodyweight Countermovement Jump with Reach
description: Perform a standard CMJ reaching overhead to a target at peak height, maximising vertical displacement.

name: Bodyweight Countermovement Jump with Rotation
description: Perform CMJ and rotate 90 degrees in the air, landing in athletic stance facing perpendicular to start position.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Countermovement Jump
description: Perform a maximal vertical jump taking off and landing on one leg, using a quick countermovement dip before takeoff.

name: Bodyweight Scissor Jump
description: From a split stance, jump and switch leg positions mid-air in a rapid scissoring motion, landing with opposite foot forward.

name: Bodyweight Star Jump
description: From a quarter squat, explode upward spreading arms and legs into a star shape at peak height, then land back in squat.

name: Bodyweight 180 Degree Jump
description: Perform a vertical jump rotating 180 degrees in the air, landing softly facing the opposite direction.

name: Bodyweight 360 Degree Jump
description: Perform a vertical jump rotating a full 360 degrees, landing in the same position facing the same direction.

name: Bodyweight Lunge Jump
description: From a deep lunge position, jump vertically and switch legs mid-air, landing in a lunge with the opposite leg forward.

name: Bodyweight Lateral Jump
description: Jump laterally to one side, landing on both feet in athletic stance. Immediately jump back to the starting position.

name: Bodyweight Depth Jump to Box
description: Step off one box, land and immediately rebound onto a second box of equal or greater height, minimising ground contact time.

name: Bodyweight Consecutive Box Jump
description: Perform repeated box jumps stepping or jumping down and immediately rebounding onto the box without pausing.

name: Bodyweight Seated Box Jump
description: Sit on a box, pause to eliminate stretch reflex, then explode upward to standing or onto a second box using pure concentric power.

name: Bodyweight Clap Push Up
description: Perform an explosive push up, clapping hands together at peak height before landing back in push up position.

name: Bodyweight Behind the Back Clap Push Up
description: Perform an explosive push up, clapping hands behind the back at peak height before returning to push up position.

name: Bodyweight Explosive Push Up
description: Perform a push up with maximum force so hands leave the ground at the top, landing softly back in push up position.

name: Bodyweight Plyometric Push Up to Box
description: Start in push up position on the floor, explode upward and land with hands on an elevated box, then drop back to floor and repeat.

name: Bodyweight Depth Push Up
description: Start with hands on two low boxes, drop into push up between them and immediately push explosively back up to the boxes.

name: Bodyweight Alternating Single Arm Explosive Push Up
description: Perform explosive push ups alternating between left and right hand elevated on a medicine ball or small box.

name: Medicine Ball Chest Pass
description: Stand facing a wall or partner and explosively throw a medicine ball from chest level using both hands, catching the rebound.

name: Medicine Ball Kneeling Chest Pass
description: From a tall kneeling position, explosively throw a medicine ball from chest level, eliminating lower body contribution to isolate upper body power.

name: Medicine Ball Seated Chest Pass
description: Sitting on the floor with legs extended, throw a medicine ball explosively from the chest to a wall or partner.

name: Medicine Ball Overhead Throw
description: Hold medicine ball overhead and throw it forward and downward with maximum force, extending through the hips and shoulders.

name: Medicine Ball Overhead Backward Throw
description: Stand facing away from target, squat down and explosively throw the medicine ball overhead and backward for maximum distance.

name: Medicine Ball Rotational Throw
description: Stand perpendicular to wall, rotate through hips and torso and explosively throw the medicine ball into the wall, catching the rebound.

name: Medicine Ball Scoop Throw
description: Hold medicine ball between legs, squat down and explosively throw it forward and upward using a scooping motion from the hips.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
description: Lift medicine ball overhead and slam it into the ground as hard as possible, using full hip flexion and lat engagement.

name: Medicine Ball Side Slam
description: Lift medicine ball overhead and slam it diagonally to one side, rotating through the trunk to generate rotational power.

name: Medicine Ball Drop and Catch
description: Lie supine with arms extended, have a partner drop a medicine ball which you catch and immediately throw back up as fast as possible.

name: Medicine Ball Explosive Floor Press
description: Lie supine holding a medicine ball at chest, explosively press and release the ball upward, catch it and immediately repeat.

name: Bodyweight Box Jump Burpee
description: Perform a burpee and immediately jump onto a box at the top of the movement, step down and repeat.

name: Bodyweight Broad Jump Burpee
description: Perform a burpee and at the top explode forward into a broad jump instead of a vertical jump.

name: Bodyweight Lateral Burpee
description: Perform a burpee and at the top jump laterally over an obstacle before dropping into the next rep.

name: Bodyweight Burpee to Pull Up
description: Perform a burpee under a pull up bar, then jump and perform a pull up at the top of the movement.

name: Bodyweight Tuck Jump Burpee
description: Perform a burpee and at the top execute a tuck jump, pulling knees to chest at peak height.

name: Bodyweight Bear Crawl Sprint
description: From quadruped position with knees hovering, sprint forward on hands and feet as fast as possible for a set distance.

name: Agility Ladder Lateral Shuffle
description: Move laterally through the ladder stepping in and out of each square with quick feet, maintaining low athletic stance.

name: Agility Ladder Crossover Step
description: Move laterally through the ladder using crossover steps, alternating feet crossing in front and behind.

name: Agility Ladder Ali Shuffle
description: Straddle the ladder and perform a rapid forward shuffle, alternating which foot lands inside each rung.

name: Agility Ladder Hopscotch
description: Alternate between landing with both feet outside the ladder rung and one foot inside, progressing forward through each square.

name: Agility Ladder Carioca
description: Move laterally through the ladder using carioca footwork — alternating crossover steps in front and behind while moving sideways.

name: Agility Ladder Single Leg Hop Through
description: Hop through each rung of the ladder on one leg, maintaining balance and speed throughout.

name: Agility Ladder Two Feet In Each
description: Run through the ladder placing both feet in each square as quickly as possible, maintaining a forward lean and arm drive.

name: Agility Ladder Lateral In-Out
description: Move laterally, stepping both feet into each rung then both feet out, progressing sideways through the ladder.

name: Cone T-Drill
description: Sprint forward to centre cone, shuffle left to cone, shuffle right past centre to far cone, shuffle back to centre, backpedal to start.

name: Cone 5-10-5 Pro Agility Shuttle
description: Straddle centre line, sprint 5 yards to one side, touch line, sprint 10 yards to the other side, touch line, sprint 5 yards back through centre.

name: Cone L-Drill
description: Sprint forward 5 yards, touch cone, sprint back, immediately sprint to far cone and round it in a figure-of-eight pattern.

name: Cone W-Drill
description: Sprint diagonally between five cones arranged in a W pattern, planting and changing direction at each cone.

name: Cone Illinois Agility Test
description: Sprint, weave through four central cones, and change direction around end cones in the standard Illinois agility course layout.

name: Cone Box Drill
description: Sprint between four cones arranged in a square — forward, lateral shuffle, backpedal, lateral shuffle back to start.

name: Suicide Line Drill
description: Sprint to progressively distant lines (foul line, half court, far foul line, end line), touching each line and sprinting back to start.

name: Shuttle Run 20m
description: Sprint 20 metres, touch the line, turn and sprint back. Repeat for prescribed reps or duration.

name: Dot Drill
description: Jump between five dots arranged in a dice-five pattern, performing prescribed footwork sequences as quickly as possible.

name: Hexagonal Agility Drill
description: Stand in the centre of a hexagon taped on the floor. Jump in and out over each side of the hexagon as fast as possible, completing the full rotation.

name: Bodyweight Repeat Tuck Jump
description: Perform consecutive tuck jumps without pausing between reps, pulling knees to chest each rep and rebounding immediately on landing.

name: Bodyweight Triple Broad Jump
description: Perform three consecutive broad jumps without pausing, immediately rebounding forward on each landing for maximum total distance.

name: Bodyweight Single Leg Triple Hop
description: Perform three consecutive forward hops on one leg, maintaining balance and covering maximum distance with each hop.

name: Bodyweight Lateral Box Shuffle
description: Stand beside a low box, step up and over it laterally then immediately step back, shuffling back and forth as quickly as possible.

name: Bodyweight Squat Jump to Box
description: From standing on the floor, perform a squat jump and land on top of the box in a soft squat position.

name: Trap Bar Depth Jump
description: Hold trap bar, step off a low platform and upon landing immediately jump as high as possible, using the added load for overload.

name: Dumbbell Squat Jump
description: Hold dumbbells at sides and perform a maximal squat jump, landing softly and resetting before the next rep.

name: Bodyweight Stiff Leg Bound
description: Bound forward with minimal knee bend, driving primarily from the hips and ankles to train posterior chain power and ankle stiffness.

name: Bodyweight Depth Jump Lateral
description: Step off box and upon landing immediately jump laterally as far as possible, training reactive lateral power.

name: Miniband Lateral Bound
description: With miniband around ankles, perform lateral bounds against band resistance, emphasising hip abductor activation on takeoff.

name: Superband Resisted Broad Jump
description: Attach superband to anchor behind you and perform broad jumps against band resistance, overloading horizontal power production.

name: Bodyweight Lateral Bound to Vertical Jump
description: Perform a lateral bound, stabilise on one leg, then immediately explode into a maximal vertical jump, combining frontal and sagittal plane power.

name: Bodyweight Zigzag Bound
description: Bound forward at alternating 45-degree angles, landing on the outside leg each time and driving diagonally on the next bound.

name: Weighted Vest Box Jump
description: Wearing a weighted vest, perform box jumps to increase external load while maintaining reactive jump mechanics.

name: Weighted Vest Depth Jump
description: Wearing a weighted vest, step off box and immediately rebound as high as possible, overloading reactive strength.
